package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for query_path_and_body_merge_performed_in_handler: Handlers that merge several request sources inline instead of normalizing inputs before service calls.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule116NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule116NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule116NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario116Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule116NegativeService, input Rule116NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
